schema.description: Describes the response body of the /getdocumentstatus API call

uploadStatus.description: Upload status, enum of NOT_UPLOADED, UPLOADED, STATUS_UNKNOWN

lastUploadedAt.description: Time of last successful upload, in epoch seconds

indexingStatus.description: Indexing status, enum of NOT_INDEXED, INDEXED, STATUS_UNKNOWN

lastIndexedAt.description: Time of last successful indexing, in epoch seconds

schema.title: GetDocumentStatusResponse
